steps.title: Multiply both sides by 150x to remove the denominator
steps.content:
Starting with $v = -\frac{w}{150x}$, multiply both sides by $150x$:

$$v \cdot 150x = -\frac{w}{150x} \cdot 150x$$

$$150vx = -w$$

steps.title: Multiply both sides by −1 to solve for w
steps.content:
Multiply both sides by $-1$:

$$-150vx = w$$

Rearranging: $w = -150vx$. That matches choice A — A is correct.
